content:
# Recommendations — for iter-015 plan

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize
- **SNAP `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_lhs`** — the LAST blocker on the associator bridge (its sibling hK_rhs landed this iter; assembly body already `hK_lhs.trans hK_rhs.symm`, sorry-free). Closing hK_lhs unblocks the bridge + the 5 cascade coherences. **Corrective TYPE = mathlib-analogist (2nd consult), NOT a warm prover retry.** Direct the analogist at the precise exposure step: how to relate `c_{A⊗B}` (counit at the COMPOSITE object `A⊗B`, not `L'A♭⊗L'B♭`) to `μ_{A,B} + (c_A ⊗ₘ c_B)`, given that `C` is not an `(L').obj _`, so that all three μ's become native and `associator_hom_app` fires. Once `α` is fully at `(L').obj _`, the LANDED hK_rhs finish (`show`-uniform-localized + `simp[tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]` + `congr 1` + `left_triangle_components_assoc`) applies verbatim. DO NOT re-assign `rw [associator_hom_app]` / `rw [associator_naturality]` — both VERIFIED no-match this iter.

## Promising approaches needing more work
- **Reusable SNAP unblock (validated this iter):** the `show`-to-uniform-all-localized-form technique dissolves the mixed `⊗ₘ`(localized)/`≫`(X.Modules) comp-instance that blocks every interchange/assoc/whisker lemma. Applies to hK_lhs AND the 5 cascade coherences (`tensorPowAdd_rightUnit`/`_braiding`/`_assoc`, `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`). Pattern recorded in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base. NB: merge with `simp only [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]`, never `rw` (rw isDefEq-bombs).

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign without a STRUCTURAL change
- **FBC `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` (L776)** — element/sheaf-level reduction is a VERIFIED KERNEL BOMB, and iter-014 proved the bomb is the **RHS reduction** (compounding value-`ModuleCat`/`X.Modules` junction whnf), NOT the residual cast. The eqToHom-calculus salvage (iter-013) is therefore unreachable. **iter-015 = pre-committed ROUTE PIVOT** (corrective TYPE = structural refactor / cross-domain mathlib-analogist): either refactor `gammaPushforwardIso` to a junction-free construction (so the value-`ModuleCat`/`X.Modules` junction never forms), or find a Mathlib-native pushforward-composition coherence for `Spec`-pushforward of modules. Do NOT fire a single-file `prove` lane on the existing construction — 4 iters (011–014) have now exhausted the element/sheaf family. Consider `mathlib-analogist` cross-domain-inspiration mode (Failed approach: per-component carrier reduction across a value/scheme module junction) and/or `refactor` on the `gammaPushforwardIso` definition shape.
- **FBC mate/crux sorries (1416, 1663, 1844, 1866)** — gated transitively on `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` (1416 crux) or out-of-scope dead-mate apparatus (1663/1844/1866). Not attemptable until the pivot lands or the mate-excision refactor runs.

## Blueprint writer tasks (gate-relevant — lvbc flagged both chapters' proof prose this iter)
- **`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp` proof** — prose presents the global-sections wrapper-collapse as succeeding ("they therefore drop"); iter-014 proved that collapse is the kernel bomb. Writer: revise to record the Γ-level RHS-reduction blockage + the iter-015 junction-free pivot. (`% NOTE` placed in-chapter.) **HARD-GATE note:** if FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean` is proposed for a prover lane next iter, this chapter must clear the blueprint gate first — but the realistic iter-015 FBC action is a strategy/refactor decision, not a prover lane, so the gate may not bind.
- **`Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs` proof** — prose presents the `associator_naturality→associator_hom_app` route as succeeding; it is blocked. Writer: revise to the real exposure obstacle (composite-object counit `c_{A⊗B}`, C not an `(L').obj _`). (`% NOTE` placed in-chapter.) This chapter feeds the live hK_lhs prover/analogist lane — patch BEFORE re-firing.

## Hygiene (MEDIUM/LOW — bundle, do not spend a prover iter on)
- **Misplaced `set_option maxHeartbeats`** (FBC L1480 + L1515–1518) scopes to `/-! -/` doc-sections, not the `theorem` → `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` runs at default 400k hb. Inert now (decls COMPILE-DEAD). Fix only at the dedicated mate-excision refactor iter; move ONE option to precede the `theorem`.
- **Stale/dead-code comment blocks** flagged by lean-auditor: FBC L184–247 (64-line iter-234/236 narrative), SNAP L2057–2115 (~60-line retained superseded tactic block), SNAP L1905–1918 (strategic route-planning instructions in source). Prune on the relevant declaration-close; not blocking.

## Coverage debt (DEFERRED, unchanged)
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 75 `lean_aux` nodes (`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*`, `W_*`, `MonoidalPresheaf`, …) — prover-created impl helpers with no blueprint entry. No NEW unmatched this iter (no new declarations). Remains DEFERRED to the dedicated SNAP file-split refactor (mark `private` to drop from the unmatched set); conflicts with same-file prover firing, so do NOT interleave.
